title: cytisus decumbens var. glabratus
intro: Cytisus decumbens var. glabratus, also known as the dwarf broom or hairy broom, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cytisus decumbens var. glabratus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
